meta.title: GoGull — Discover, plan & share Dalmatia
meta.description: An interactive map, short videos and an AI day planner for Split and Dalmatia. Discover hidden gems, build the perfect day trip and share it with a single code — free, in 6 languages.
meta.partnersDescription: Targeted visibility for your business and direct collabs for content creators — all in one place.

hero.headline: knows where to go
hero.disclaimer: The app is currently available in a limited area. We're constantly expanding across Croatia!

users.title: For you
users.subtitle: A local in your pocket, not another guidebook
users.intro: A map that knows Dalmatia, videos that let you feel a place before you set foot there, and a planner that builds your day. All in one spot.

trust.fee: We earn a small fee from businesses, not from you

map.title: A map that knows Dalmatia
map.description: Beaches, taverns, viewpoints, hidden spots — sorted by category and vibe, with live info on crowds and opening hours.

video.title: See the place before you arrive
video.description: Short videos of every location — you don't read about a place, you watch it. No photos from 2019, no touch-ups.

plan.title: A planner that builds your day
plan.description: Turn saved spots into a day trip — AI suggests the order, timing, costs and a local tip for every stop.

showcase.title: Map, planner and a share code — a whole trip in three moves
showcase.intro: This is what it looks like from the inside. No bookings, no transactions — just discovering, planning and sharing.

map.label: Interactive map
map.title: All of Dalmatia, sorted by your vibe
map.description: Beaches, food & drink, nature, heritage, nightlife, local producers — filter by category, subcategory or vibe: romantic, kid-friendly, hidden gems. Every location shows how crowded it is and whether it's open right now.

planner.label: Day planner
planner.title: From saved spots to a realistic day
planner.description: Pick stops from your Nest and AI puts them in a logical order, estimates timing and costs and adds a local tip for each — based on your day's vibe: chill, adrenaline, culture, food or romance.
planner.aiTip: Tip: hit Kašjuni before 10 am — after that there's no room for your towel.

share.label: Share by code
share.title: A whole trip in six characters
share.description: Every plan gets a unique code. Send it to a friend, they type it in and see the whole trip — stops, route, costs. No sign-up, no install. It works for single places you describe in your own words, too.
share.hint: Type the code and see the whole trip — no sign-up

howItWorks.title: Discover. Plan. Share.
howItWorks.intro: Three steps that naturally follow each other — from "where to today?" to a finished plan in someone else's pocket.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Scroll the map and the videos — from famous beaches to hidden spots that never make the guidebooks.

plan.title: Plan
plan.description: Save what you like to your Nest and build a realistic, doable day with a little help from AI.

share.title: Share
share.description: Send the plan with a single code — your friend opens it without signing up and follows your trail.

extras.eyebrow: And the little things that make the difference
extras.title: Small details, big character

nest.title: The Nest
nest.description: Your saved locations, organized into collections — a personal wishlist of Dalmatia.

quiz.title: Quizzes & fun facts
quiz.description: Hovering over Split on the map? Get a quick quiz and stories about the area, with points for correct answers.

community.title: Community
community.description: Visual reviews, atmosphere verdicts and publicly shared plans from fellow explorers.

languages.title: 6 languages
languages.description: Croatian, English, German, Spanish, French and Italian — for locals and guests alike.

crowd.title: Live crowd info
crowd.description: Before you head out, see how busy it is and whether the place is open right now.

platforms.title: Web & Android
platforms.description: Works in the browser and as an app — no mandatory install.

business.title: For business
business.subtitle: Seen by people who are actually nearby
business.intro: No burning budget on the whole country — your location reaches whoever's actually close and actually interested.
business.radiusLabel: That's how far your audience sees you
business.highlight: Cheaper and more precise than Google and Meta ads. No guesswork.
business.transparency: We charge a small fee per published video and per ticket sold — that's it. No hidden costs, no surprises on your invoice.

visibility.title: Targeted visibility
visibility.description: Only people within a 50 km radius see your location — not all of Croatia.

analytics.title: Analytics that mean something
analytics.description: See views, saves, and real interest — not just reach numbers.

sales.title: More sales
sales.description: The right info reaches the right people, right when they need it.

value.title: No overpaying
value.description: Far more affordable and precise than Google or Meta ads.

influencers.title: Influencer matchmaking
influencers.description: We find creators who'll actually shoot a good video for you, not recycled content.

creators.title: For creators
creators.subtitle: More reach, direct collabs
creators.intro: Already filming the places you love? Turn it into reach and collabs with businesses that need exactly that content.

reach.title: More reach
reach.description: Your video reaches people actually looking for that spot — plus a tag to your other profiles.

collab.title: Direct collaborations
collab.description: No agencies, no waiting — we connect you straight to businesses that need content.

freshness.title: You know how it is right now, not last summer
freshness.paragraph: For every location we surface what matters most, and the community keeps it fresh together. Google serves you a photo that's two years old and a review from someone who visited once. We show you footage from this morning.

old.title: Google · ChatGPT
old.p2: A review that might've been accurate once
old.p3: No clue how it actually is right now

new.title: GoGull
new.p1: Video from this morning, not last summer
new.p3: The community flags it the moment something changes

footer.brandTagline: A local guide, planner and community of explorers — with a Dalmatian twist.
footer.newsletterDescription: Leave your email — we'll tell you the moment GoGull lands where you are.
footer.success: Thanks! We'll let you know when we reach your city.
footer.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
